---
title: "Cynthia Budiyanto"
image: images/fun_pic.JPG
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 10cm
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/cynthia-budiyanto/
      icon: linkedin
    - text: Github
      href: https://github.com/cyneollie
      icon: github
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:budiya1@stolaf.edu
      icon: envelope-fill
---

Hi everyone! {{< fa grin title="Grinning face" >}} My name is Cynthia Budiyanto and I am an international student from Indonesia at [St. Olaf College](https://wp.stolaf.edu/). I am majoring in Biology and Statistics & Data Science, with a concentration in Biomolecular Science. In my college, I am actively involved in research and student teaching. I am passionate about scientific development and I would love to do research that is application-driven, aiming to produce computational models that integrate diverse data sources to better understand and treat diseases. **Welcome to my website!**
